title: Crafting a Compelling Tech Support Email
scenario: A customer is experiencing issues with their software. Write a prompt that generates an effective tech support email. The email should be under 150 words and include a clear subject line, a friendly greeting, a concise problem description, and a call-to-action to schedule a call.
constraints: Must include a clear subject line
Must include a concise problem description

evaluationCriteria.description: Does the email meet all the specified constraints?
Is the tone of the email friendly and approachable?
Is the email clearly and concisely written?
